phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cercanías platform to airport is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está el andén de Cercanías al aeropuerto?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el ahn-DEHN deh ther-kah-NEE-ahs al ah-eh-roh-POHR-toh?

likely_response.local: Andenes C1 y C2, nivel inferior.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DEH-nehs TH Y TH nee-BEHL een-feh-ree-OHR
likely_response.translation_en: Platforms C1 and C2, lower level.

responses.english: Platforms C1 and C2, lower level.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DEH-nehs TH Y TH nee-BEHL een-feh-ree-OHR
responses.local: Andenes C1 y C2, nivel inferior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the AVE ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de AVE?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es-TAH la tah-KEE-yah deh AH-veh?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, frente a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, opposite the entrance.

responses.english: On the ground floor, opposite the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: En la planta baja, frente a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if luggage lockers have space available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay espacio en las consignas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-yeh ehs-PAH-thyoh en lahs kohn-SEE-nyahs?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the panel.

responses.english: It is indicated on the panel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bus station exit is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la salida a la estación de buses?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah sah-LEE-dah ah lah ehs-tah-SYOHN deh BOO-sehs?

likely_response.local: Salida norte, siga las señales amarillas de buses.
likely_response.pronunciation: sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-mah-REEL-lahs DEH BOO-sehs
likely_response.translation_en: North exit, follow the yellow bus signs.

responses.english: North exit, follow the yellow bus signs.
responses.phonetic: sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-mah-REEL-lahs DEH BOO-sehs
responses.local: Salida norte, siga las señales amarillas de buses.
